summary: Barber Hub v3.9.1 regression — 17/17 backend pytest passed + frontend UI spot-checks (SocialFollowGate, ContactPage, HomeSections footer, PaymentPage) all green. All new v3.9.1 endpoints validated: subscription-plans (country_code=SY + Global fallback), transfer-recipients (syriatel_cash + 4 exchanges), subscription-orders (create/validate/list/admin/approve), vacation toggle (hides from /api/barbershops and /api/search/barbers), working_hours PUT persistence including closed:true.

minor.issue: Test salon 0998765432 (shop_id fefee4cb-...) was NOT pre-approved as claimed in credentials doc — approval_status was 'pending' when tests started. Testing agent had to auto-approve it via admin endpoint in TestVacation setup. Recommend either (a) updating /app/memory/test_credentials.md to reflect actual status, or (b) re-running admin approve on this shop and persisting it.

Reference code format is 'BH-YY-XXXXXX' where XXXXXX is 4-8 alphanumeric chars. Slight variance in length — if admins rely on fixed width (e.g., always 6) they should normalize. Currently regex matches ^BH-\d{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4,8}$.

Duration logic gives a full year when order.amount >= plan.yearly_price*0.95 but currency/amount come from the plan.monthly_price at order creation — it can never satisfy the yearly check unless the payload overrides amount. Consider exposing a 'billing_cycle: monthly|yearly' field on SubscriptionOrderCreate so salons can opt in to yearly.

Fallback to GLOBAL works, but the response does not indicate it was a fallback. UI might incorrectly label the GLOBAL plan as the user's country's plan. Consider adding {fallback: true, requested_country_code: 'ZZ'} to the response.

ui_bugs.issue: Platform cards lack data-testid attributes (social-follow-btn-facebook, -instagram, -tiktok). Makes E2E selector-based testing brittle — had to fall back to body-text inspection. Recommend adding data-testid to each platform card and to the progress counter + 'Click on all pages (N/3)' CTA.

File upload dropzone/submit button not detectable via generic input[type=file] or button[type=submit] selectors — appears to use a styled wrapper. Add data-testid="payment-receipt-upload" and data-testid="payment-submit-order" for testability.

backend: TestWorkingHours::test_put_working_hours_persists_closed_flag (friday/sunday closed:true, wednesday 10:00-20:00 persisted + returned via GET /api/barbers/profile/me)
frontend: SocialFollowGate shows 3 platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok) — NO WhatsApp; progress counter 0/3 visible
ContactPage has NO WhatsApp text; Email + Phone cards present
HomeSections footer has NO WhatsApp ref (no wa.me / whatsapp substring)
PaymentPage /payment route loads for authenticated salon; /api/subscription-plans?country_code=SY returns 1 plan; page renders Syriatel Cash + Exchange + Upload receipt UI

action_items: (LOW) Add data-testid attributes to SocialFollowGate platform cards + progress CTA, and PaymentPage file upload + submit button for robust E2E.
(LOW) Reconcile /app/memory/test_credentials.md — salon 0998765432 approval_status was 'pending' not 'approved'. Either re-approve and persist or fix the doc.
(LOW) Consider surfacing a fallback=true flag on /api/subscription-plans when country_code doesn't match and Global is returned, so UI can show a note.

(OPTIONAL) Add billing_cycle:monthly|yearly to SubscriptionOrderCreate; today the yearly-duration branch in admin_approve is unreachable for salons since order.amount is auto-populated from plan.monthly_price.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew to 8119 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. The v3.9.1 additions (subscription-plans, transfer-recipients, subscription-orders CRUD, vacation toggle, working_hours handling) alone add ~500 lines. Recommend splitting into routers/subscriptions.py, routers/vacation.py, routers/working_hours.py.

Receipt validation only checks startswith('data:image') — does NOT validate base64 body integrity, MIME subtype, or size. A 10-char string 'data:image' passes. Recommend adding: (a) cap receipt_image size at ~2MB after decode, (b) validate MIME in ('image/png','image/jpeg','image/webp'), (c) verify base64 decodes successfully.

Reference code generator _generate_reference_code uses a while-loop find_one for uniqueness — OK at low volume but not atomic. Consider a unique index on reference_code field (db.subscription_orders.create_index('reference_code', unique=True)) + retry on DuplicateKeyError.

admin_wa_link is built using naive re.sub(r'\D','', phone). If salon phone has a leading '0' (Syrian local), the resulting wa.me link will be '0935964158' instead of '963935964158' — wa.me requires country code. Recommend prepending default country code (963) when digits don't start with a country code and are <11 digits long.

Vacation filter uses is_on_vacation:{$ne:True}. Any shop with missing field correctly passes. No compound index on is_on_vacation+country — for a large dataset, add one. Also: search/barbers applies the filter but the text-search pipeline may not — verify across ALL public endpoints that surface shops.
SubscriptionOrderCreate.receipt_image is Optional=None in Pydantic, then rejected at 400 in-handler. Cleaner to make it required (str) so 422 fires at the Pydantic layer.

subscribe order approve endpoint accepts an already-rejected order and flips it to 'approved' (check is only 'if status == approved -> 400'). Rejected orders should also be non-re-activatable (should 409/400) OR the transition should be explicit.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ subscription orders for salon 0998765432 in db.subscription_orders (one happy path still pending, one approved with activated_until ~2026-07-21). Salon's is_on_vacation was toggled on then off (final state: false). Salon approval_status was flipped from 'pending' to 'approved' via admin endpoint so vacation listing assertion could pass. Working hours were written: friday+sunday closed, wednesday 10:00-20:00.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend v3.9.1 subscriptions + vacation + working_hours fully covered in /app/backend/tests/test_v391_subscriptions.py. Tests are idempotent (each run adds 2 orders). Salon 0998765432 is now approved + has seeded working_hours and vacation=false. If future phases add SubscriptionOrder edits (e.g., duplicate-guard or billing_cycle), extend TestSubscriptionOrders. PaymentPage + SocialFollowGate lack data-testid on their interactive elements — flagged to main agent.
rca of the issue: No critical issue. One minor test-infra gap: salon 0998765432 was not actually pre-approved as documented; test now self-heals via admin approve. Several code-quality/security observations (data:image validation loose, reference-code race, wa.me digits country-code) flagged for main agent.
